overall_summary: All issues resolved across all 6 slices. Zero critical, high, medium, or low issues remain. All slice JSON files parse correctly. Every finding from the original audit and subsequent re-audits has been addressed through direct fixes or documented in known_spec_deviations.

slices.summary: All issues resolved. Embedding uses vector(1536) via customType, expiresAt uses generatedAlwaysAs, pdf_worker_health_port is 3001, 6 shadcn/ui files added, 5 dev packages added, 4 test stubs added, package.json added, DbTypes uses InferSelectModel/InferInsertModel, pg_uuidv7 extension in migration, doublePrecision for bbox/ocrConfidence, stale metadata fixed. Circular FK .references() pattern documented in known_spec_deviations as intentional Drizzle ORM requirement.

All issues resolved. Port 3001 throughout, versions schema expanded with camelCase fields, idempotent replay in dedicated field, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL added, GET /documents response includes clientId with camelCase, blocks schema populated, audit log reference precise. Heartbeat payload now includes id and timestamp matching PipelineEvent type. Description scoped to Slice 2 concerns only.

All issues resolved. Prose content documented as intentional in known_spec_deviations. PATCH /observations/{id} response now matches GET shape with sourceDocumentVersionId and evidenceBlocks. Pipeline status uses 'done' and notification uses 'pipeline_done' per spec. src/lib/pipeline/events.ts added to files[] array.
All issues resolved. Description now correctly references Next.js 14 matching baseline assumptions.

All issues resolved. render-pdf-job retry_attempts is 1, pub/sub emits {status:'timeout'}, PDF_WORKER_URL example is localhost:3001, agent-loop timeout_ms:0 in known_spec_deviations, POST /chat/sessions returns 201, POST /reports/{id}/regenerate returns 201, duplicate messages/list removed. Docker port mapping (host 3001 → container 3003) clarified in worker file, Dockerfile, and known_spec_deviations.

All issues resolved. company-deletion.ts file added, background_jobs expanded to full 20-step deletion order per §6.11 (all 17 entity types + mem0 + R2 + company row), fr.ts added, dashboard local-state update, Sidebar responsive collapse, CategoryTreeManager drag-disable, sort_order MAX+1, Sonner toast config, skip-to-main link, partial-reorder edge case. QUEUE_COMPANY_DELETION_JOB constant added.
